basic_details.post_name: Teaching Faculty (Professor, Associate Professor, Assistant Professor)
basic_details.short_information: Employees’ State Insurance Corporation (ESIC) Ahmedabad Teaching Faculty Recruitment 2026 notification has been released on the official website of ESIC Ahmedabad. A total of 33 vacancies have been announced for the posts of Professor, Associate Professor, and Assistant Professor under Advertisement No. 02 of 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 69 years for all posts. Age relaxation will be provided as per the prevailing norms of Government of India (GOI).

qualification.education_qualification: In accordance with the latest guidelines of the National Medical Commission (NMC/MCI)

content_sections.heading: ESIC Ahmedabad Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the ESIC Ahmedabad Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download ESIC Ahmedabad Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ESIC Ahmedabad Teaching Faculty Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Professor: In accordance with the latest guidelines of the National Medical Commission (NMC/MCI) Associate Professor: In accordance with the latest guidelines of the National Medical Commission (NMC/MCI) Assistant Professor: In accordance with the latest guidelines of the National Medical Commission (NMC/MCI)

content_sections.heading: ESIC Ahmedabad Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 69 years for all posts. Age relaxation will be provided as per the prevailing norms of Government of India (GOI).

content_sections.heading: ESIC Ahmedabad Salary 2026
content_sections.text: Professor: Rs. 1,18,500/- (Level 13) + Other Allowances Associate Professor: Rs. 78,800/- (Level 12) + Other Allowances Assistant Professor: Rs. 67,700/- (Level 11) + Other Allowances

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for ESIC Ahmedabad Various Posts Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies for Teaching Faculty posts in ESIC Ahmedabad?
faq.answer: ESIC Ahmedabad is recruiting for a total of 33 vacancies for Teaching Faculty positions, including Professor, Associate Professor, and Assistant Professor.

faq.question: Q2. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly at the specified venue and time.

faq.question: Q3. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for ESIC Ahmedabad Teaching Faculty posts is scheduled for 03 August 2026.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the candidates applying for these posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all Teaching Faculty posts is 69 years, with age relaxation applicable as per Government of India norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Professor post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Professor post is Rs. 1,18,500/- (Level 13) plus other allowances.

faq.question: Q6. What are the required qualifications for the Teaching Faculty posts?
faq.answer: The qualifications required are in accordance with the latest guidelines of the National Medical Commission (NMC/MCI).

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for female candidates?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for female candidates. The fee is Nil for them.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve Document Verification followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the ESIC Ahmedabad located for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The ESIC Ahmedabad is located in Ahmedabad, Gujarat, with a pincode of 380024. The exact venue details will be in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates apply online for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, candidates cannot apply online. This recruitment is strictly through a Walk-in Interview process.
